title: Creeping Cats
description: Creeping Cats is a cat buff mod that makes cats really scary for creepers. Whenever a cat is around, creepers don't explode.
body:
Creeping Cats makes cats really scary for creepers. Whenever a cat is around, creepers don't explode.

Creepers **CANNOT explode** in a **30 block range** of any cat or ocelot, tamed or not.

See the gallery for examples...
